messages.content: i want you to continue the category sandboxed workflow we interrupted from where it left off with run id: 8379e084-085d-4c2d-9d16-62656c5de0df

pending_tool_call.explanation: I will resume the category sandboxed workflow for poundwholesale.co.uk using the provided run ID as the sandbox suffix to continue from where it left off.
